mapper.select: SELECT fp.id as "id", fp.order_id as "orderId", fp.customer_id as "customerId", dc.customer_name as "customerName", dc.customer_email as "customerEmail", fp.amount as "amount", fp.currency as "currency", fp.payment_method as "paymentMethod", dpm.method_display_name as "paymentMethodDisplay", dpm.method_type as "paymentMethodType", fp.gateway_transaction_id as "gatewayTransactionId", fp.gateway_name as "gatewayName", fp.gateway_response as "gatewayResponse", fp.retry_count as "retryCount", fp.failure_reason as "failureReason", fp.state_id as "stateId", fp.flow_id as "flowId", fp.created_time as "createdTime", fp.last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM hm_query.fact_payments fp LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_customer dc ON fp.customer_id = dc.customer_id LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_payment_method dpm ON fp.payment_method = dpm.method_code WHERE fp.id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.fact_payments GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.fact_payments WHERE payment_method = #{paymentMethod}

SELECT fp.id as "id", fp.order_id as "orderId", fp.customer_id as "customerId", dc.customer_name as "customerName", fp.amount as "amount", fp.currency as "currency", fp.payment_method as "paymentMethod", dpm.method_display_name as "paymentMethodDisplay", fp.state_id as "stateId", fp.flow_id as "flowId", fp.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fact_payments fp LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_customer dc ON fp.customer_id = dc.customer_id LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_payment_method dpm ON fp.payment_method = dpm.method_code WHERE fp.payment_method = #{paymentMethod} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.fact_payments WHERE state_id IN ('FAILED', 'ABANDONED')

SELECT fp.id as "id", fp.order_id as "orderId", fp.customer_id as "customerId", dc.customer_name as "customerName", fp.amount as "amount", fp.payment_method as "paymentMethod", fp.failure_reason as "failureReason", fp.retry_count as "retryCount", fp.state_id as "stateId", fp.flow_id as "flowId", fp.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fact_payments fp LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_customer dc ON fp.customer_id = dc.customer_id WHERE fp.state_id IN ('FAILED', 'ABANDONED') ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT CAST(created_time AS DATE) as "paymentDate", COUNT(*) as "transactionCount", SUM(amount) as "totalRevenue", currency as "currency" FROM hm_query.fact_payments WHERE state_id IN ('SUCCEEDED', 'SETTLED') GROUP BY CAST(created_time AS DATE), currency ORDER BY "paymentDate" DESC

SELECT fp.id as "id", fp.order_id as "orderId", fp.amount as "amount", fp.currency as "currency", fp.payment_method as "paymentMethod", dpm.method_display_name as "paymentMethodDisplay", fp.state_id as "stateId", fp.flow_id as "flowId", fp.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fact_payments fp LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_payment_method dpm ON fp.payment_method = dpm.method_code WHERE fp.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT fp.id as "id", fp.order_id as "orderId", fp.customer_id as "customerId", dc.customer_name as "customerName", fp.amount as "amount", fp.currency as "currency", fp.payment_method as "paymentMethod", dpm.method_display_name as "paymentMethodDisplay", fp.gateway_transaction_id as "gatewayTransactionId", fp.gateway_name as "gatewayName", fp.state_id as "stateId", fp.flow_id as "flowId", fp.created_time as "createdTime", fp.last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM hm_query.fact_payments fp LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_customer dc ON fp.customer_id = dc.customer_id LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_payment_method dpm ON fp.payment_method = dpm.method_code WHERE fp.id = #{id}
